tests.test_name: pytest - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single pytest fixture and verifies that the documentation pipeline produces valid, fully-resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'pytest_single_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: pytest - PO - parametrize expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven pytest fixture and verifies that each parametrize row is expanded into its own test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - PO - parametrize expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'pytest_datadriven_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: pytest - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single pytest fixture and verifies that the JSON output contains at least one named test with a fully populated coverage matrix.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'pytest_single_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven pytest fixture and verifies that parametrize rows collapse into a single test with a coverage matrix whose row count matches the number of examples and conforms to the generic schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'pytest_datadriven_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the parametrize examples, and rows conform to the generic schema
